landing.heroTitle: The World Cup prediction pool for your friends
landing.heroSubtitle: Predict exact scores, earn points, and climb the leaderboard. Fast, simple, and fully optimized for mobile.
landing.feature1Desc: Invite friends using a simple 6-letter invite code to compete in a private group.
landing.feature2Desc: Submit and update your predictions up until the minute before kickoff.
landing.feature3Desc: Earn bonus points by predicting the Champion, Semifinalists, Golden Boot, and Golden Ball.

auth.title: Sign in to the Pool
auth.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a passwordless magic link to log in.
auth.linkError: That sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one and open it in the same browser where you asked for it.
auth.checkEmailDesc: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link to log in.
auth.error: Error sending email. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Welcome to the Pool!
onboarding.description: Choose your display name for the leaderboards and your preferred language.

dashboard.title: My Leagues
dashboard.noLeagues: You aren't in any leagues yet.

league.title: League Details
league.noLeaderboard: The leaderboard will calculate once the first matches are played.
league.createDesc: Name your league of friends and get ready to compete.
league.joinDesc: Enter the 6-character code that was shared with you.

matches.title: Match Predictions
matches.noMatches: No matches found for the selected filters.
matches.saveConfirmDesc: You are saving {count} predictions. You can edit any match until it starts.
matches.toastSkipped: Skipped {count} matches because they already started or were voided: {matches}

bonuses.title: Tournament Predictions
bonuses.description: These picks will lock at the start of the tournament (June 11, first kickoff). Make sure to save them before then!

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidInvite: Invite code must be exactly 6 alphanumeric characters.
